assertionResults.observed: Recovery view rendered all required panels (Readiness, HRV, RHR, Body Temp Deviation) with aligned multi-day strips, visible baseline shading/average guides, and workout markers spanning the strip stack.

S3 narrative was not visible in the Recovery UI capture: no "10K run" label, no "3 days" recovery insight text, and on-screen current values were Readiness 81 / HRV 57.5 instead of the expected S3 dip context. API check for same range showed S3 dip-recovery values and 10K annotation but insightsCount=0.

For reference date 2026-01-02, the baseline window had 10 points (<14) but both night and recovery responses still returned populated rhr baselines (sample_count=10). Delta fields were null, but direction remained "neutral" and baseline objects were not suppressed.

frictions.description: Fresh browser session redirected to /sign-in before dashboard assertions could run.
frictions.resolution: Generated local mock auth token for user_test_001 and set __session cookie in the isolated browser session.

frictions.description: agent-browser network request listing returned no captured request details for this run.
frictions.resolution: Collected equivalent request/response evidence using curl artifacts for recovery and cross assertion APIs.

summary: Validated 3 assertions: 1 passed (VAL-UIRCV-001) and 2 failed (VAL-UIRCV-003, VAL-CROSS-018). Recovery panel structure is present, but S3 narrative expectation and <14-day baseline suppression behavior were not met on observed surface.
